results.title: Telangana BJP chief opposes issuing permanent residence certificates without verification
results.description: Telangana BJP President N Ramchander Rao opposes issuing Permanent Residence Certificates without verification, citing security risks and illegal immigration concerns.

results.title: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and New Zealand Prime Minister Christopher Luxon and others during a delegation level meeting.
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi travelled to New Zealand from Australia in the third and final leg of his three-nation tour that largely focused on expanding cooperation in the Indo-Pacific region.

results.title: Andy Burnham’s grip on No. 10 is firm but his plans are not
results.description: Andy Burnham is set to become the UK's next prime minister. His plans for government remain largely unknown to allies and MPs. Many Labour members express unease about untested ideas and a lack of consultation. Burnham has promised significant changes to how the country is run. His approach risks undermining party unity under future pressures.

results.title: UP minister Suresh Khanna rejects Ayodhya temple donation allegations against SP and Congress
results.description: Uttar Pradesh Minister Suresh Khanna criticises SP and Congress over allegations of embezzlement related to Ayodhya Ram Temple donations, calling them politically motivated.

results.title: Why Samsung's Galaxy Tab S Range is the Smartest Tablet Buy Right Now
results.description: Samsung in the premium tablet industry is bucking the trend by offering flagship performance without the hidden costs. This article explores how the Galaxy Tab S range delivers unmatched value,...

results.title: Minister Vivek outlines govt’s vision for a skilled Telangana
results.description: Telangana’s government is aggressively expanding global career prospects for its youth through the Foreign Employment Mega Job Mela. With a strategic focus on overseas placements in Germany and beyond, and the establishment of 120 Advanced Technology Centres (ATCs) powered by Tata Group support, the state is transforming into a hub for skilled manpower. Explore how these initiatives are creating high-value jobs and driving Telangana toward a $3-trillion economy.

results.title: Wimbledon: Sinner stuns Djokovic to storm into second successive final at All-England
results.description: London, July 10, 2026 World No. 1 and defending champion Jannik Sinner produced a clinical display to outclass seven-time winner Novak Djokovic 6-4, 6-4, 6-4 in the men’s singles semifinal at Centre Court in London on Friday, sealing his place in the Wimbledon final with a dominant straight-sets victory. Sinner controlled the contest from the [...] The post Wimbledon: Sinner stuns Djokovic to storm into second successive final at All-England appeared first on Yes Punjab News .

results.title: 65-foot-long-necked dinosaur fossils discovered in Thailand: Its unique 'laminae' bones are unlike any other species ever found on the Earth
results.description: Paleontologists in Thailand have identified a new long-necked dinosaur species. This plant-eating creature, Uragasaurus kalasinensis, lived approximately 150 million years ago. Its neck was exceptionally long, making up half its total body length. Unique bony structures and air cavities set this dinosaur apart from others. This discovery marks the first Mamenchisauridae family find in mainland Southeast Asia.

results.title: Spain Secures Semifinal Spot in FIFA World Cup 2026 After Thrilling Victory Over Belgium
results.description: Spain has reached the semifinals of the FIFA World Cup 2026 after a thrilling 2-1 victory against Belgium. With standout performances from players like Mikel Merino and Lamine Yamal, Spain is set to face France in a highly anticipated match. Yamal's confidence and past victories over France add an intriguing layer to this upcoming clash. Discover the match highlights and what to expect as these two football powerhouses prepare to battle for a place in the final.

results.title: Hema Malini shares on audience's love for Hindi film tracks: 'Not only Indians, but even foreigners listen to our songs'
results.description: Hema Malini honored her late husband Dharmendra at a concert celebrating her career. The event also recognized Dharmendra's significant contributions to Indian cinema. Malini spoke about the enduring popularity of 1970s and 1980s Hindi film songs. She recently accepted the Padma Vibhushan award posthumously for Dharmendra. Family members attended the emotional tribute to the legendary actor.

results.title: Uttarakhand high court to hear suspended BKTC employee’s plea on July 16
results.description: Pramod Nautiyal challenges his suspension from BKTC amid theft allegations at Badrinath Temple. Next hearing set for July 16 in Uttarakhand High Court.

results.title: Sonam Wangchuk in conversation with Abhijeet Dipke, founder of the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP).
results.description: Wangchuk rejected hero comparisons, called for exam reforms, and urged people to join the July 20 Parliament March in Delhi.

results.title: Iran Politics: Iran's New Supreme Leader Remains Out of Public View Amid Speculation
results.description: Questions continue to surround Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mustafa Khamenei, who has remained out of public view even after assuming the country's top position. Mustafa, the second son of late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, is believed to wield enormous influence behind the scenes and has deep links with Iran's powerful Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC). Born in Mashhad and now 56 years old, he has never held an official government position or contested an election but has long played a significant role in Iran's political and military affairs. Reports suggest Mustafa was injured during the conflict involving Iran, Israel and the United States and is still recovering, which may explain his absence from public events. According to reports, he communicates through handwritten messages delivered by trusted couriers and relies heavily on consultations with IRGC generals. Analysts describe him as a "mystery man" and a "shadow figure" who has controlled key aspects of Iran's government and military from behind the scenes for nearly two decades.
